name: Rock Springs Sweet Onion Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Size sweet onions, thinly sliced
1 small Green pepper, sliced 1/4 inch wide
2/3 cup Cooked and drained dark red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix cornmeal with 2/3 cup cold water. In a small saucepan, bring the remaining 2/3 cup of water to a boil. Gradually add the cornmeal mixture to the boiling water, whisking constantly until thick. Remove from heat and stir in 2 tablespoons Parmesan cheese.
3. When cool enough to handle, pat cornmeal mixture evenly into a 12-inch pizza pan or lightly greased baking sheet.
4. Bake crust uncovered for 15 minutes or until golden.
5. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-low heat. Add onion, garlic, and green pepper; cook uncovered for three minutes. Stir in basil, oregano, and black pepper. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for five minutes. Stir in beans and set aside.
6. Remove crust from oven and sprinkle with half of the mozzarella cheese and half of the remaining Parmesan cheese. Spoon bean mixture on top. Pour pizza sauce evenly over it and scatter remaining cheese on top.
7. Bake uncovered for 10-15 minutes or until cheese is melted.
8. Cut into wedges and serve.
